+{

+    "title": "netdata: Pgbouncer monitoring",
+    "description": "Pgbouncer monitoring. Requested by 5+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current netdata setup",
+        "description": "Verify your netdata version and configuration:\n```bash\nnetdata -v\n```\nThis feature requires a working netdata installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review netdata configuration",
+        "description": "Review the relevant netdata configuration:\nWe are willing to support monitoring ***[Pgbouncer](https://pgbouncer.github.io/)*** with netdata."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Pgbouncer monitoring",
+        "description": "Ok, guys. I've added the initial version of the PgBouncer collector. Initially, I used the python version as an example, but pretty fast realized that it had some problems and ended up reading PgBouncer-related articles, PgBcouner GitHub repo issues, and source code. The [PgBouncer\n```yaml\nyourjobname:\n    host: \"yourhost\"\n    user: \"youradminuser\" #make sure it is an admin in pgbouncer configuration\n    password: \"duh\"\n    port: \"6432\"\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Upgrade netdata to include the fix",
+        "description": "If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade netdata:\n```bash\n# Check current version\nnetdata -v\n# Follow the project's upgrade guide at https://github.com/netdata/netdata\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected.\nConfirm the feature described in \"Pgbouncer monitoring\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Ok, guys. I've added the initial version of the PgBouncer collector. Initially, I used the python version as an example, but pretty fast realized that it had some problems and ended up reading PgBouncer-related articles, PgBcouner GitHub repo issues, and source code.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "yourjobname:\n    host: \"yourhost\"\n    user: \"youradminuser\" #make sure it is an admin in pgbouncer configuration\n    password: \"duh\"\n    port: \"6432\""
+      ]
+    }
+  },
